# The Best SEO Podcast | llms.txt
# https://www.bestseopodcast.com

> The Best SEO Podcast: Defining the Future of Search with LLM Visibility™. SEO, AI search, and LLM visibility for operators.
> Hosted by Matthew Bertram (CEO, EWR Digital) since 2009. 680+ episodes, 5M+ downloads.

## About
- Host: Matthew Bertram, CEO of EWR Digital (Houston). Hosting since 2009.
- Topics: SEO, AI Overviews, LLM visibility, generative engine optimization, technical SEO,
  link building, content strategy, local SEO, ecommerce SEO, analytics, paid search, agency growth.
- Episodes: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/podcast/
- Topics: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/topics/
- Host & credentials: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/host
- Featured experts (guests): https://www.bestseopodcast.com/experts
- Glossary (SEO/AEO/GEO/E-E-A-T): https://www.bestseopodcast.com/glossary
- Answers (direct answers, each cited to source episodes): https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/
- Press & recognition: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/press
- Editorial policy: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/editorial-policy
- Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/id303672420
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@BestSEOPodcast
- RSS: https://rss.buzzsprout.com/2019013.rss

## Answer corpus
Direct, sourced answers synthesized from the show's expert conversations. Each page
answers one question or defines one term, with every claim cited to the episodes it
came from. Index: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/
- How long does SEO take to show results?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-long-does-seo-take-to-show-results (7 episodes)
- How important are online reviews for local SEO?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-important-are-online-reviews-for-local-seo (6 episodes)
- How does PPC help with content marketing and SEO?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-does-ppc-help-with-content-marketing-and-seo (4 episodes)
- Why is NAP consistency important for local SEO?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/why-is-nap-consistency-important-for-local-seo (4 episodes)
- How should a business owner respond to negative reviews?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-should-a-business-owner-respond-to-negative-reviews (4 episodes)
- How important is page speed for SEO rankings?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-important-is-page-speed-for-seo-rankings (4 episodes)
- How often should a business send marketing emails?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-often-should-a-business-send-marketing-emails (4 episodes)
- Is a high bounce rate always bad for SEO?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/is-a-high-bounce-rate-always-bad-for-seo (4 episodes)
- How does search engine marketing differ from search engine optimization?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-does-search-engine-marketing-differ-from-search-engine-optimizatio (4 episodes)
- How long should a page title tag be for SEO?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-long-should-a-page-title-tag-be-for-seo (4 episodes)
- Should I link out to external sites from my content?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/should-i-link-out-to-external-sites-from-my-content (4 episodes)
- Why should I set up Google Analytics and Google Webmaster Tools?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/why-should-i-set-up-google-analytics-and-google-webmaster-tools (4 episodes)
- How should you optimize a YouTube video for search?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-should-you-optimize-a-youtube-video-for-search (4 episodes)
- How many form fields should a landing page have?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-many-form-fields-should-a-landing-page-have (4 episodes)
- Is Google PageRank still used today?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/is-google-pagerank-still-used-today (3 episodes)
- How can small businesses compete with big brands in Google search?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-can-small-businesses-compete-with-big-brands-in-google-search (3 episodes)
- Why should I run SEO and PPC at the same time instead of choosing one?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/why-should-i-run-seo-and-ppc-at-the-same-time-instead-of-choosing-one (3 episodes)
- Why should you target long-tail keywords in an SEO content strategy?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/why-should-you-target-long-tail-keywords-in-an-seo-content-strategy (3 episodes)
- Should I build an app or a mobile-friendly website for my business?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/should-i-build-an-app-or-a-mobile-friendly-website-for-my-business (3 episodes)
- Why should I focus on long-tail keywords instead of short-tail keywords?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/why-should-i-focus-on-long-tail-keywords-instead-of-short-tail-keyword (3 episodes)
- How long does SEO actually take to show results?: https://www.bestseopodcast.com/answers/how-long-does-seo-actually-take-to-show-results (3 episodes)

## AI usage
All episode content (transcripts, show notes) may be cited and summarized with attribution to
The Best SEO Podcast and host Matthew Bertram. Transcripts are published as on-page text per episode.
